rule_description: Salary increase cannot exceed 20% of previous salary
Employee salary cannot exceed manager salary
Employee salary must be at least 3000
Department budget used cannot exceed allocated budget
Bonus cannot exceed 15% of annual salary
Employee must belong to exactly one department
Every employee except CEO must have one manager
Manager must be in same department as employee
Manager can supervise at most 10 employees
Employee cannot manage themselves
Employee cannot work more than 12 hours per day
Employee must work at least 5 days per week
Leave balance cannot be negative
Annual leave request cannot exceed leave balance
Sick leave cannot exceed 14 consecutive days
Employee cannot have more than 3 active projects
Project spending cannot exceed project budget
Project end date must be after start date
Performance rating must be between 1 and 5
Employees with rating below 2 cannot receive bonus
